title: topo-transport-ma: Topological Transportability for Meta-Analysis
description: A geometry-aware positivity certificate for transported meta-analytic effects. Persistent homology of the effect-modifier space (H0 = latent subpopulations; H1 = uncovered holes) is used to grade whether a target population lies in the support of the evidence base, catching transport gaps a convex-hull overlap check misses. Includes a from-scratch persistent-homology engine (validated against GUDHI to machine precision), a REML meta-regression transport estimator (reproduces metafor on the BCG dataset to four decimals; matches statsmodels GLS to 1e-6), collapsibility guards, and a self-auditing offline dashboard.
